# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.1.x   | ✅        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do **not** report security vulnerabilities via public GitHub issues.

Instead, open a private security advisory through GitHub:
**[Report a vulnerability](https://github.com/ThelzenGroup/HexelUI/security/advisories/new)**

Include:
- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested fixes

We will respond within 48 hours and aim to release a patch within 7 days for confirmed vulnerabilities.
